step_rationale: Regulator of G-protein signaling; loss impairs endothelial barrier integrity and promotes dysfunction.
mechanism: G-protein regulator maintaining endothelial barrier function; miR-330-3p-suppressed in MI progression.

references.title: miR-330-3p promotes acute coronary syndrome progression via targeting RGS5.
Down-regulated RGS5 by genetic variants impairs endothelial cell function and contributes to coronary artery disease.
